/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MotionWavePlus.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MotionWavePlus.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MotionWavePlus.dir/src/audio/RingBuffer.cpp.o -o MotionWavePlus -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
